m_b.integer: The rank must be a number
m_b.select_trial: Select a Team Trial series from the list

main_menu.info:
Want to help and see your artwork here?
Contact the developer!
main_menu.pragma_info:
Displays the database version.
More information in the 'Help' window.
main_menu.add_uma_info: Add a new Uma to the database
main_menu.add_trial_info: Add a new Team Trials race series
main_menu.show_results_info: View detailed results of your Uma
main_menu.choose_team_info:
Set your current TT team lineup
to speed up result entry.
main_menu.author: Author
main_menu.license_info:
Click to read the GNU GPL license
on the official website.
main_menu.github_info: Click to visit the GitHub program repository.

uma_add.info:
Add an Uma to the database by entering
her name and rank, and assigning
a distance category.
uma_add.name: Name
uma_add.rank_info:
Give a numeric score without commas (16150),
not a rank (UG1)!

add_trial.title: Add Team Trials
add_trial.info:
Add a Team Trials to the database by entering
its date and time.
add_trial.hour_format_btn:
Select time format.
To select 'PM', type 'p' after the hour.
To select 'AM', remove 'P' from 'PM'.
This setting will be saved.
add_trial.check_info:
Check this to keep the date field filled
after adding a trials.
This setting will be remembered.

add_results.title: Add Results
add_results.info: Enter the Uma positions for the given Team Trials.
add_results.help:
Select the Team Trials series from
the dropdown list on the right,
then enter the finishing positions as integers.

actual_team.title: Actual Team
actual_team.info:
Assign your Umas to a specific distance
by selecting them from the lists.

help.title: Help
help.welcome:
Welcome to UmaTT-db!
Please read this help guide to use the program comfortably.
help.authors:
Program Author:
Mateusz Jamróz

Contributors:

Graphic Authors:
help.first: The first step should be adding a new Uma to the database.
help.first2: To do this, click 'Add Uma' in the main menu.
help.first3:
Enter her name, rating,
and assign a distance from the dropdown list.
help.first5:
The Uma will be saved in the database.
It will be assigned a unique ID, so it is treated
as a unique character. If you want to enter a better version
of the same Uma, simply add it as a new one.
